key_risks: A sudden reversal in the AI/semiconductor momentum trade due to valuation concerns or profit-taking.
A hawkish surprise from the June FOMC meeting, which could disproportionately impact high-duration growth and tech equities.
Geopolitical tensions affecting Taiwan or South Korea, disrupting semiconductor supply chains.

portfolio.rationale: Strong momentum and fundamental support from AI infrastructure buildout, with global chip sales up 25% QoQ and 79.2% YoY.
Broad tech exposure benefits from the same AI tailwinds and strong software pricing power noted in the briefing.
High beta to the semiconductor cycle and strong recent momentum (up 10.7% in 7 days, 132% in 6 months).
Direct beneficiary of semiconductor and AI hardware demand, showing strong momentum (up 8.33% in 7 days).

portfolio_rationale: The portfolio is heavily tilted toward the semiconductor and AI technology theme, which shows exceptional momentum and fundamental support in the briefing data. Global chip sales are surging, and major tech capex is forecast to increase significantly, providing a strong catalyst for continued outperformance in the near term.
rationale_summary: Allocating to high-momentum technology and semiconductor assets, along with heavily correlated Asian markets (South Korea and Taiwan), to capture the ongoing AI infrastructure boom.
